changes.description: Front matter: all five mandatory fields present and valid.
changes.citation: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 1-7: work_id=LC-S11A, branch=launch-core/lc-s11a-trust-blocker-correction, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=MIXED. All five SOP v1.3.1 mandatory fields present.

changes.description: Defect 1 (insights[] placeholder): Authority source confirmed. backend/core/insights/synthesis.py lines 330-375, MockLLMClient.generate_insights() InsightGraph branch. Fires when user_prompt contains '**Arbitration summary (stamped):**'. Generates 'summarise structured signals; review with your clinician' with empty biomarkers_involved. Serialised to public API at backend/app/routes/analysis.py lines 231-244. No existing gating.
changes.citation: synthesis.py:330-375: InsightGraph path generates placeholder payload with title='{category.title()} focus: summarise structured signals; review with your clinician'. analysis.py:231-244: iterates dto.insights directly into response JSON. CONFIRMED — no gating present.

changes.description: Defect 2 (blood sugar unsupported narrative): Authority source confirmed. backend/core/analytics/domain_narrative_wave1.py, met_contributor_primary() approximately lines 477-497. When no active signals and primary_idl is None, function falls back to governed_idl_field('ph_metabolic_early_ir_v1', 'subtitle'). governed_idl_field() reads the YAML field without checking severity_state. ph_metabolic_early_ir_v1 has severity_state='not_observed' in this run but subtitle ('A pattern suggesting early impaired sugar and lipid handling') is returned. Fix: add severity_state != 'not_observed' guard before the governed_idl_field fallback, skipping to 'Your key blood sugar markers are within their reference ranges.' fallback when the record is not_observed.
changes.citation: domain_narrative_wave1.py:471-474: g = governed_idl_field(_ID_IR, 'subtitle') — called unconditionally when no signal match. governed_idl_field() at lines 32-43: reads field from registry without severity_state check. _ID_IR = 'ph_metabolic_early_ir_v1'. IDL record severity_state confirmed as 'not_observed' in analysis JSON. CONFIRMED.

changes.description: Defect 3 (ApoA1 directionality): Authority source confirmed. knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb45_apoa1_low_cardio_risk/signal_library.yaml. Signal name is 'ApoA1 low cardiovascular context', trigger_direction=low, but activation_config.upper_bound_state='suboptimal' causes the evaluator to fire for elevated ApoA1. Evaluator at backend/core/analytics/signal_evaluator.py lines 153-165 returns upper_bound_state when primary_value > high, with no trigger_direction guard. Fix: set enable_upper_bound=false in activation_config in the signal_library.yaml to prevent firing for above-max values while preserving below-min (low) direction firing. Cursor must confirm the evaluator reads enable_upper_bound before applying.
changes.citation: signal_library.yaml:9: signal_id=signal_apoa1_cardio_risk. signal_library.yaml:17: trigger_direction=low. signal_library.yaml:43-46: activation_config: upper_bound_state=suboptimal, enable_lower_bound=true, lower_bound_state=suboptimal. signal_evaluator.py:159-165: upper_bound_state returned when primary_value > high — no trigger_direction guard. ApoA1 value 1.73 > lab max 1.69 -> fires as suboptimal. CONFIRMED root cause.

changes.description: Defect 4 (low ALT liver false alarm): Authority confirmed. bio_stats_engine.py lines 24-60 uses symmetric z-score around midpoint — no directional awareness. scoring_policy.yaml has no direction_aware, one_sided, lower_bound_cap, or floor_score field for ALT. ALT=7 with range 10-49 scores ~0.051 (5.1/100). Domain score assembler (domain_score_assembler.py:liv_block) passes this directly to the liver rail. No existing mechanism to cap low-bound violations for ALT. Cursor must inspect the scoring calibration pipeline before choosing the minimal fix point. STOP condition applies if the fix requires redesigning all enzyme scoring globally.
changes.citation: scoring_policy.yaml: read in full — no direction_aware, lower_bound_cap, or floor_score field present for ALT or for liver-class enzymes. bio_stats_engine.py:24-60: symmetric z-score formula. domain_score_assembler.py:liv_block(): base_100 = overall_score from liver rail, which aggregates individual biomarker scores including ALT. CONFIRMED gap — direction-aware scoring mechanism does not exist for ALT.

changes.description: Internal sprint string leak in consumer JSON: backend/core/analytics/domain_score_assembler.py line ~427, cv_block() hardcodes ev['deferred_kb_content'] = 'lipid_dominant_cv_why_it_matters_gap_deferred_sprint'. This key is serialised into the consumer-facing JSON under consumer_domain_scores[0].raw_evidence_refs. Fix: remove this key from the ev dict in cv_block() or relocate it to an internal-only debug structure not serialised to the public API. This is within Defect 1 / consumer JSON hygiene scope.
changes.citation: domain_score_assembler.py:427: ev['deferred_kb_content'] = 'lipid_dominant_cv_why_it_matters_gap_deferred_sprint' — hardcoded string in cv_block(). Confirmed present in downloaded consumer analysis JSON under consumer_domain_scores[0].raw_evidence_refs.deferred_kb_content. CONFIRMED leak.

changes.description: Test path error in cursor prompt: prompt line 432 specifies 'test_lc_s8f_phase_b_uk_si_true_conversions.py'. Actual file is 'backend/tests/regression/test_lc_s8f_phase_b_true_conversions.py'. File confirmed to exist at the correct path. Cursor must use the actual filename. This does not block execution but Cursor must not attempt to run the named-in-prompt path.
changes.citation: Glob confirmed: test_lc_s8f_phase_b_true_conversions.py EXISTS. test_lc_s8f_phase_b_uk_si_true_conversions.py MISSING. Cursor must run: python -m pytest backend/tests/regression/test_lc_s8f_phase_b_true_conversions.py -q

Defect 4 modifies scoring configuration consumed by calibration/scoring engines (Intelligence Core). HIGH risk classification and BEHAVIOUR controls are correctly applied per SOP §3 and §10. Behavioural audit requirements are in scope.
changes.citation: signal_evaluator.py:153-174: _evaluate_lab_range_activation_state() is Intelligence Core per SOP §3. signal_library.yaml modification directly changes evaluator output for ApoA1. CONFIRMED — HIGH risk correctly classified.

changes.description: Scope boundary: no scope creep detected. All four defects bounded to identified authority files. Forbidden files (run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py, update_cursor_status.py) confirmed non-overlapping with correction targets. Prohibited changes list verified against all four defect fixes.
changes.citation: Prompt lines 153-172: forbidden changes list read. No overlap with correction targets. No unit governance, no LC-S8F/S8G changes, no global scoring rewrite, no new clinical claims. PASS.

stop_conditions_checked.alt_fix_requires_global_enzyme_scoring_r: UNRESOLVED — Cursor must inspect calibration pipeline depth before implementing Defect 4. STOP if global redesign required.
stop_conditions_checked.verdict: No hard STOP conditions triggered. Defect 4 has a conditional STOP that Cursor must evaluate at Phase 1 investigation. Sprint may proceed to Phase 1.

implementation_order_note: Phase 1 (investigation doc) first — required table must be complete before any implementation. Defect 1 (insights gating) is lowest blast-radius fix. Defect 2 (blood sugar fallback guard) is a contained single-function change. Defect 3 (ApoA1 signal_library.yaml upper_bound disable) requires verification that the evaluator correctly handles enable_upper_bound=false before modifying. Defect 4 (ALT scoring cap) requires calibration pipeline inspection at Phase 1 before Cursor can determine the minimal safe fix. Bonus H6 (deferred_kb_content removal) should be bundled with Defect 1 consumer JSON cleanup.
